name: Nene Kusanagi
description:
"It was bad, wasn't it?"

☆

It seems Nene is playing a role that requires an operatic tone. According to her friend, her vowels were off! Now it's time to practice for hours on end.

This is a little self-indulgent, because I enjoy everything choir and opera.

Here is your cat to hopefully lighten up your day!
creator: violetastersss
